segments.name: Intro / Set-up
segments.description: Opening pose & entrance — orient to the floor, find partner connection before the groove drops

segments.name: Phrase 1 (16 cts)
segments.description: First swing groove — initial basic action & travel pattern

segments.name: Phrase 2 (16 cts)
segments.description: Develop the basic — add styling and partner shape changes

segments.name: Phrase 3 (16 cts)
segments.description: Travel section — covering floor with the swing rhythm

segments.name: Phrase 4 (16 cts)
segments.description: Build to first musical accent — preparing for a hit

segments.name: Phrase 5 — Hit & Release (16 cts)
segments.description: Major musical accent — sharp shape, then back into groove

segments.name: Phrase 6 (16 cts)
segments.description: Second swing groove — variation on the basic

segments.name: Phrase 7 (16 cts)
segments.description: Showcase trick / lift / signature move section

segments.name: Phrase 8 (20 cts)
segments.description: Climb in energy — featured choreography sequence

segments.name: Phrase 10 (16 cts)
segments.description: Drive toward the finale — accelerating shapes

segments.name: Phrase 12 — Finale Hits (16 cts)
segments.description: Final musical hits — sharp accents and dramatic shapes

segments.name: Ending Pose
segments.description: Last beats — settle into the closing pose and hold
